# Youth Activism Nepal

> Youth Activism Nepal is a youth-focused nonprofit organization in Nepal working on civic engagement, leadership, community projects, campaigns, partnerships, and youth development.

This website provides information about the organization, team, partners, projects, campaigns, blogs, and donation details.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/): Overview of Youth Activism Nepal, mission, activities, and impact.
- [Team](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/team/): Team members and leadership profiles.
- [Partners](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/partners/): Partner organizations and collaborators.
- [Past Projects](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/projects/): Completed projects and past initiatives.
- [Active Campaigns](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/active-campaigns/): Current campaigns and live initiatives.
- [Upcoming Projects](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/upcoming-projects/): Planned and upcoming projects.
- [Blogs](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/blogs/): Blog archive and updates.
- [Donate](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/donate/): Donation details and support information.

## Content Notes

- Blog and project detail content is loaded dynamically from the backend API.
- [Sitemap](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/sitemap.xml): Index of public static pages.
- [Contact and Support](https://youthactivismnepal.org.np/donate/): Donation details and contact information.

## Optional

- [llms.txt Proposal](https://llmstxt.org/): Background and format guidance for the llms.txt convention.
